mapper.select: SELECT * FROM links WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE links SET default_target_url = #{defaultTargetUrl}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, og_image = #{ogImage}, fb_pixel_id = #{fbPixelId}, ga_tracking_id = #{gaTrackingId}, custom_script = #{customScript}, is_ad_enabled = #{isAdEnabled}, ad_timer_seconds = #{adTimerSeconds}, is_paywalled = #{isPaywalled}, price = #{price} WHERE id = #{id}
